content: Something is Inside Your House... And it's something horrifying. Verity's voice actor (did an even GREATER job than part 1): @JustWhispy Friend in the video: @Twixxel_lesgo My Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj This is part 2 of the Minecraft Verity Series: Something I trusted has been here longer than I knew. Every exit leads back home. Every village is empty. And the friend I brought to help me disappeared without a sound, while he just kept smiling. NO, you CANNOT repost dubbed versions of my videos. If you dubbed them, email me and I might add it as an official audio track. Intro - 0:00 - 0:26 Video - 0:26 - 20:42 Outro - 20:42 - 20:51 This video is a horror short film, it uses scripted editing and sounds to add the main entity in video. Please do not ask for the mod. #minecraft #minecrafthorror #horror #minecraftarg
chineseContent: 你的房子里有东西……而且很可怕。 Verity 的配音演员（比第 1 部分做得更好）：@JustWhispy 视频中的朋友：@Twixxel_lesgo 我的 Spotify：https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj 这是 Minecraft Verity 系列的第 2 部分：我信任的东西存在的时间比我知道的还要久。每个出口都通向回家。每个村庄都是空的。而我带来的帮我的朋友却无声无息地消失了，而他却一直微笑着。不，您不能重新发布我的视频的配音版本。如果您为它们配音，请给我发电子邮件，我可能会将其添加为官方音轨。简介 - 0:00 - 0:26 视频 - 0:26 - 20:42 结尾 - 20:42 - 20:51 该视频是一部恐怖短片，它使用脚本编辑和声音来添加视频中的主要实体。请不要索要模组。 #minecraft #minecrafthorror #恐怖 #minecraftarg
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
